should_trigger: Create a Pi local wiki extension package from this documentation repo
Validate a generated local wiki package and tune search stopwords
Update a scaffolded wiki extension from the local-wiki template
should_not_trigger: Use local ArchWiki to troubleshoot pacman signatures
Research source code internals of an npm library
Write a PATCH.md for a code refactor

ambiguous.prompt: Improve the Hyprland local wiki package search quality
ambiguous.decision: Use wiki-tools for package maintenance/tuning; use hyprland-local for answering Hyprland user questions from the wiki.
ambiguous.reason: The prompt references Hyprland but asks to maintain the local wiki package itself.

notes: Package scaffolding, validation, template refreshes, and wiki search tuning route here.
